description: CompositionRed kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and a round slit neck, and embroidered stripes with an elasticated waistline just below the torso FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this stylish kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish front, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
